Follow the repository agent rules in `AGENTS.md`.

Key expectations:

- Use test-driven development for application code changes wherever practical.
- Run relevant tests and quality checks after updates.
- Keep developer, user, admin, API, business, operations, architecture, ticket, security, data-governance, and AI docs current.
- Keep changes scoped to the user's instructions.
- Protect user work and do not run destructive git commands unless explicitly asked.
- Maintain security, privacy, robustness, observability, release, and local/cloud runtime expectations.
- For AI features, maintain safety controls, evals, prompt/model governance, cost tracking, replayability, and incident handling.
- Report the rule-compliance check result after every update.
